profile.name: Aryan Kasat
profile.title: AI/ML Engineer | Generative AI Systems
profile.tagline: Building Scalable GenAI Systems & Constitutional AI for Enterprise

about.summary: AI/ML engineer with expertise in building scalable GenAI systems, pretraining foundational models, and designing alignment frameworks. Specializing in LLM architectures, Constitutional AI, and agentic integrations using the Model Context Protocol (MCP). Passionate about advancing research at the intersection of machine learning ethics and systems engineering.
achievements: Featured speaker & researcher at the 2026 IndiaAI Impact Summit
Selected among the top-6 national teams in the case study competition by German High-Bridge Consulting
Mentored 300+ undergraduate students as a computer programming lab teaching assistant

experience.description: Engineering large-scale language model systems and alignment frameworks for enterprise applications.
highlights: Developed a 1B-parameter education-focused foundational model with custom vocab compilation and tokenization.
Engineered an end-to-end multimodal LLM fine-tuning pipeline utilizing PyTorch and Nvidia Megatron scaling architectures.
Upgraded enterprise RAG pipelines to Agentic-RAG architectures featuring Model Context Protocol (MCP) integrations.

experience.description: Worked on computer vision and apparel intelligence systems for fashion cataloging.
highlights: Developed deep learning models for automated garment parsing and apparel attribute extraction.
Engineered layout segmentation pipelines using PyTorch to structure multi-layered catalog elements.
Accelerated automated label validation operations by 40% utilizing zero-shot classification methodologies.

experience.description: Conducted research on the ethical evaluation and alignment strategies of Large Language Models.
highlights: Evaluated moral reasoning and cognitive processing behaviors across 13 major open and closed LLMs.
Curated a specialized evaluation dataset of 600+ complex moral dilemmas to test philosophical alignments.
Co-authored evaluations resulting in bias elimination frameworks targeted for speculative decoding setups.

education.degree: Post Graduate Program - AI and Machine Learning

education.institution: The LNM Institute of Information Technology

projects.title: Multi-Agent Logistics Enhancement System
projects.description: Built a multi-agent logistics automation workflow coordinating operations.
projects.fullDescription: Developed a distributed multi-agent system coordinating logistics, weather data collection, routing, and operational adjustments dynamically. Built using FastAPI and FAISS for semantic search on operational directives, integrating the Model Context Protocol (MCP) for tool execution and live Weather API updates.
highlights: Coordinated 5 specialized agents under a centralized supervisor routing model
Achieved real-time operational decision-making incorporating changing atmospheric contexts
Used Model Context Protocol (MCP) to standardize external system actions

projects.title: AMBEDKAR Alignment Framework
projects.description: Co-developed an SLM-LLM speculative decoding alignment framework.
projects.fullDescription: Co-developed the AMBEDKAR framework, an SLM-LLM speculative decoding pipeline built to eliminate cognitive bias and optimize safety alignment. Used speculative alignment principles to maintain standard response distribution while minimizing safety training compute requirements.
highlights: Implemented speculative decoding for real-time alignment and safety masking
Significantly reduced bias on moral dilemmas benchmarks without harming downstream QA capabilities
Pre-trained small helper models specifically on ethical reasoning vectors

projects.title: 1B Foundational Model Pretraining Pipeline
projects.description: Designed and engineered an end-to-end foundational pretraining setup.
projects.fullDescription: Created a multi-node, distributed pretraining environment to build an educational-domain foundational model of 1B parameters. Configured model scaling settings, compiled customized tokenizers tailored for academic codebases, and handled high-throughput data loading modules.
highlights: Configured Nvidia Megatron tensor parallelisms across multi-GPU setups
Constructed a custom vocabulary tokenizer representing dense programming paradigms
Integrated real-time learning logs and evaluation loops with Weights & Biases

projects.title: Enterprise Agentic-RAG MCP Platform
projects.description: Upgraded enterprise naive retrieval networks to Agentic retrieval systems.
projects.fullDescription: Upgraded enterprise document access pathways from naive semantic search to a dynamic agentic retrieval platform. Employed router agents executing custom query compilers, vector similarity lookups in ChromaDB, and document preprocessing via Azure Document Intelligence.
highlights: Implemented hierarchical retrieval algorithms on unstructured multi-page documents
Used Model Context Protocol (MCP) to let agents execute standard system SQL scripts on demand
Enabled dynamic evaluation metrics logging using Langsmith for response consistency

publications.title: Reasoning or Rhetoric? An Empirical Analysis of Moral Reasoning Explanations in Large Language Models
publications.description: Analyzes the cognitive processing behaviors and moral reasoning quality in LLMs under complex philosophical constraints, demonstrating the gap between reasoning and superficial alignment rhetoric.

publications.title: AMBEDKAR: A Multi-level Bias Elimination through a Decoding Approach with Knowledge Augmentation for Robust Constitutional Alignment of Language Models
publications.description: Introduces a novel multi-level decoding framework using knowledge augmentation for eliminating bias and aligning language models with constitutional constraints.

certifications.title: NVIDIA DLI - Fundamentals of Deep Learning
